task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Helpdesk tools

abstract.p: Lets look at the tools that are available to the help desk.

li.p: There are a lot of manuals and videos available for download and consultation by the help desk.
The TSM ready for use, and it offers a lot of solutions for error messages and common problems on the printer.
There are several application guides and white papers available for help.
Via ORS you can contact the print system and get service (worklist) information.
Via ORS you can get error information from the print system.
If not solvable by the help desk, the error has to be dispatched to a technician.
The digital logbook contains all statistics from the print system.
You can for instance judge the error history an decide if a service visit is necessary.
Via remote assistance you can take over the User interface of the customer (after his aproval).
You can check all setting and the behavior of the system.
In ORS you can see if maintenance is due on the print system.
If so it can now be planned and carried out by a technician.
